data.body:
[operator-attested] Post-redeploy validation on the box (EC2 i-00880b2c7f13527c5), autodeploy 'deploy complete: env now reflects 79a10387a', review-bot container recreated 2026-07-16T01:24:51Z:
- safe.directory ACTIVE: container env has GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 / GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0=safe.directory / GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0=/var/gerrit/site/reviewbot-tickets.
- Dubious-ownership RESOLVED: 'git -C /var/gerrit/site/reviewbot-tickets rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree' now returns 'true' (previously 'fatal: detected dubious ownership'). The guard fires on any repo-opening git op, so the artifact-emit 'git commit' path is unblocked.
- ARTIFACT_EMIT_ERROR count since deploy (01:24) = 0 (previously recurred every ~10 min).
- Bonus (logging fix 726, also live): structured INFO events now recording in journald, e.g. {"event": "reconcile_done", "scanned": 8, "reviewed": 0, "cursor_advanced": true} — these were silently dropped before. Reconciler healthy, cursor advancing.
Note: reviewed=0 at validation time (no open changes → no fresh vote), so a live code_review artifact write will be produced by the next organic patchset; the write path itself is proven unblocked by the git-op success above.
